visa_types.name: Residence Permit
visa_types.documents_required:
There is a wide variety of application forms. The applicant is responsible for selecting the form and submitting the documents requested in it. Visit the Danish Migration Service (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB) to read the information on each type of application and its requirements.
If you have already filled out your application form and have already made the online payment by obtaining your Case Order ID from the Danish Migration Service, you can now request an appointment at VFS.
If you applied with ONLINE application form you must submit in VFS:
- Online payment receipt with Case Order Id
- Application voucher with online form (printed out in color)
- Cover letter from the portal
- Payment online receipt from Denmark website
- Printed payment receipt of the Danish embassy fee using this link
 
https://dys.um.dk/permit/ (https://dys.um.dk/permit/)
- Original passport with at least three months of validity after the end of your residence period
- Color copies of the entire passport including the cover (tapas)* even if it is new all passport must be in high resolution color copy.
- Filled out form of the application desirable in computer. (Color print out)
- Please be mindful of once you have applied online and have your Case Order ID, you must contact us to be able to give your appointment before 14 days of the submission of your application online.
Links of interest:
- Residence permit Au Pair (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/News-Front-Page/2017/12/New-rates-2018-au-pair)
- Student resident permit (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-want-to-apply/Study/Higher-education)
- Family reunification residence permit (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-want-to-apply/Family)
- Work residence permit (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-want-to-apply/Work)
- Working Holiday (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-want-to-apply/Working-Holiday)
- PHD (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-want-to-apply/PhD)
visa_types.processing_time: Please visit this website to find out the processing times for Denmark New to Denmark (nyidanmark.dk) (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/Words and Concepts Front Page/US/Diverse US/Application_processing_times_at_the_Immigration_services)

visa_types.full_text:
## Fees

[Table:  Residence Permit]

 *VFS Service fee described above need to be paid on the date of your appointment. Staff will confirm the local price.

## Documents Required
There is a wide variety of application forms. The applicant is responsible for selecting the form and submitting the documents requested in it. Visit the Danish Migration Service (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB) to read the information on each type of application and its requirements.
If you have already filled out your application form and have already made the online payment by obtaining your Case Order ID from the Danish Migration Service, you can now request an appointment at VFS.
If you applied with ONLINE application form you must submit in VFS:
- Online payment receipt with Case Order Id
- Application voucher with online form (printed out in color)
- Cover letter from the portal
- Payment online receipt from Denmark website
- Printed payment receipt of the Danish embassy fee using this link
 
https://dys.um.dk/permit/ (https://dys.um.dk/permit/)
- Original passport with at least three months of validity after the end of your residence period
- Color copies of the entire passport including the cover (tapas)* even if it is new all passport must be in high resolution color copy.
- Filled out form of the application desirable in computer. (Color print out)
- Please be mindful of once you have applied online and have your Case Order ID, you must contact us to be able to give your appointment before 14 days of the submission of your application online.
Links of interest:
- Residence permit Au Pair (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/News-Front-Page/2017/12/New-rates-2018-au-pair)
- Student resident permit (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-want-to-apply/Study/Higher-education)
- Family reunification residence permit (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-want-to-apply/Family)
- Work residence permit (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-want-to-apply/Work)
- Working Holiday (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-want-to-apply/Working-Holiday)
- PHD (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-want-to-apply/PhD)

## Processing time
Please visit this website to find out the processing times for Denmark New to Denmark (nyidanmark.dk) (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/Words and Concepts Front Page/US/Diverse US/Application_processing_times_at_the_Immigration_services)
